tickets.subject: Microsoft 365 migration planning
tickets.message: Need a staged migration approach for 140 users across three regions.

updates.message: Discovery workshop has been scheduled for Thursday 10:00 AM.

leads.name: Riley Henderson
leads.message: We need compliance hardening and managed support for a regulated team.

services.title: Starter Plan
services.description: ₦50,000/month for small businesses with basic Microsoft 365 admin and email support.

services.title: Business Plan
services.description: ₦100,000/month for growing teams that need tenant management, baseline security, and faster support.

services.title: Enterprise Plan
services.description: ₦250,000/month+ for larger organizations that need compliance, migration support, and priority SLA coverage.

notifications.title: Platform Notice 3
notifications.message: Subscription renewal batch scheduled for tonight at 21:00.

content_entries.Website content: Refresh homepage positioning for Microsoft 365 managed operations and enterprise support.
content_entries.Testimonials: Highlight recent migration delivery wins and managed support satisfaction notes.
content_entries.FAQs: Add billing, onboarding, and compliance workflow questions for enterprise buyers.
content_entries.Service information: Clarify migration, deployment, compliance, and consultation engagement stages.
content_entries.Announcements: Prepare admin-controlled platform notices for maintenance windows and release changes.
content_entries.Blog/news architecture: Outline publishing workflow for insights, updates, and thought leadership content.
